mapper.select:
SELECT A.PRODUCT_NO, A.PRODUCT_NAME, A.SALE_PRICE, A.COST_PRICE, A.VAT_AMOUNT, A.SALE_START_DATE, A.SALE_END_DATE, A.DISPLAY_YN, A.SELLER_ID, A.PRODUCT_SUMMARY, A.MD_COMMENT, A.DESCRIPTION, A.PAYMENT_INFO, A.SHIPPING_INFO, A.EXCHANGE_RETURN_INFO, A.REFUND_INFO, A.REG_DT, A.MOD_DT FROM TB_PRODUCT A
ORDER BY A.PRODUCT_NO DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT P.PRODUCT_NO, P.PRODUCT_NAME, P.SALE_PRICE, P.COST_PRICE, P.VAT_AMOUNT, P.SALE_START_DATE, P.SALE_END_DATE, P.DISPLAY_YN, P.SELLER_ID, SM.COMPANY_NAME AS SELLER_NAME, P.PRODUCT_SUMMARY, P.MD_COMMENT, P.DESCRIPTION, P.PAYMENT_INFO, P.SHIPPING_INFO, P.EXCHANGE_RETURN_INFO, P.REFUND_INFO, P.REG_DT, P.MOD_DT, -- 구성상품 정보 PC.COMPOSITION_ID, PC.BUNDLE_ID, PC.SORT_ORDER, BP.PRODUCT_NAME AS BUNDLE_PRODUCT_NAME, BP.SALE_TYPE AS BUNDLE_SALE_TYPE, ST.CODE_NAME AS BUNDLE_SALE_TYPE_NAME, BP.SALE_STATUS AS BUNDLE_SALE_STATUS, SS.CODE_NAME AS BUNDLE_SALE_STATUS_NAME, CG.STORAGE_TYPE_CD AS BUNDLE_STORAGE_TYPE, STC.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS BUNDLE_STORAGE_TYPE_NAME, CG.PROCESS_DIV_CD AS BUNDLE_PROCESS_TYPE, PTC.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS BUNDLE_PROCESS_TYPE_NAME, CG.SALE_DIV_CD AS BUNDLE_DIVISION_TYPE, DVC.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS BUNDLE_DIVISION_TYPE_NAME, BP.SALE_PRICE AS BUNDLE_SALE_PRICE, BP.COST_PRICE AS BUNDLE_COST_PRICE, BP.VAT_AMOUNT AS BUNDLE_VAT_AMOUNT, BP.SALE_START_DATE AS BUNDLE_SALE_START_DATE, BP.SALE_END_DATE AS BUNDLE_SALE_END_DATE, COALESCE(BP.DISPLAY_YN, CG.USE_YN) AS BUNDLE_DISPLAY_YN, COALESCE(BP.SELLER_ID, CG.SALE_MEMBER_NO) AS BUNDLE_SELLER_ID, BM.COMPANY_NAME AS BUNDLE_SELLER_NAME, CG.REG_DT AS BUNDLE_REG_DT, CG.MOD_DT AS BUNDLE_MOD_DT, -- 이미지 정보 PI.IMAGE_ID, PI.PRODUCT_NO AS IMAGE_PRODUCT_NO, PI.IMAGE_TYPE, PI.IMAGE_PATH, PI.ORIGINAL_NAME, PI.SORT_ORDER AS IMAGE_SORT_ORDER FROM TB_PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER SM ON P.SELLER_ID = SM.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN TB_PRODUCT_COMPOSITION PC ON P.PRODUCT_NO = PC.PRODUCT_NO LEFT JOIN TB_BUNDLE_PRODUCT BP ON PC.BUNDLE_ID = BP.BUNDLE_ID LEFT JOIN TB_COMPONENT_GOODS CG ON PC.BUNDLE_ID = CG.COMPONENT_COMP_CD LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER BM ON BP.SELLER_ID = BM.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN TB_CODE ST ON BP.SALE_TYPE = ST.CODE AND ST.GROUP_CODE = 'SALE_TYPE' LEFT JOIN TB_CODE SS ON BP.SALE_STATUS = SS.CODE AND SS.GROUP_CODE = 'SALE_STATUS' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE STC ON CG.STORAGE_TYPE_CD = STC.DETAIL_CODE AND STC.GROUP_CODE = '001' AND STC.CODE = '001001' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE PTC ON CG.PROCESS_DIV_CD = PTC.DETAIL_CODE AND PTC.GROUP_CODE = '001' AND PTC.CODE = '001003' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE DVC ON CG.SALE_DIV_CD = DVC.DETAIL_CODE AND DVC.GROUP_CODE = '007' AND DVC.CODE = '007002' LEFT JOIN TB_PRODUCT_IMAGE PI ON P.PRODUCT_NO = PI.PRODUCT_NO WHERE P.PRODUCT_NO = #{value} ORDER BY PC.SORT_ORDER
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_PRODUCT ( PRODUCT_NAME, SALE_PRICE, COST_PRICE, VAT_AMOUNT, SALE_START_DATE, SALE_END_DATE, DISPLAY_YN, SELLER_ID, PRODUCT_SUMMARY, MD_COMMENT, DESCRIPTION, PAYMENT_INFO, SHIPPING_INFO, EXCHANGE_RETURN_INFO, REFUND_INFO, REG_DT, MOD_DT ) VALUES ( #{productName}, #{salePrice}, #{costPrice}, #{vatAmount}, #{saleStartDate}, #{saleEndDate}, #{displayYn}, #{sellerId}, #{productSummary}, #{mdComment}, #{description}, #{paymentInfo}, #{shippingInfo}, #{exchangeReturnInfo}, #{refundInfo}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_PRODUCT SET PRODUCT_NAME = #{productName}, SALE_PRICE = #{salePrice}, COST_PRICE = #{costPrice}, VAT_AMOUNT = #{vatAmount}, SALE_START_DATE = #{saleStartDate}, SALE_END_DATE = #{saleEndDate}, DISPLAY_YN = #{displayYn}, SELLER_ID = #{sellerId}, PRODUCT_SUMMARY = #{productSummary}, MD_COMMENT = #{mdComment}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, PAYMENT_INFO = #{paymentInfo}, SHIPPING_INFO = #{shippingInfo}, EXCHANGE_RETURN_INFO = #{exchangeReturnInfo}, REFUND_INFO = #{refundInfo}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
